Package org.mitre.synthea.modules.covid

Class C19VaccineAgeDistributions

java.lang.Object
org.mitre.synthea.modules.covid.C19VaccineAgeDistributions
public class C19VaccineAgeDistributions extends Object
This class parses the CSV file that is created by calling the CDC API for COVID-19 vaccination information. The API can be found at:

https://data.cdc.gov/resource/km4m-vcsb

The number of doses given in a day is used to select a date for when an individual in the simulation will get their vaccine. EnumeratedDistributions are created for each age group, with the days weighted by the number of doses administered on that day.

    C19VaccineAgeDistributions.AgeRange
    Representation of an age range in years with logic for parsing the format used by the CDC API.

  • Constructor Details

    • C19VaccineAgeDistributions

      public C19VaccineAgeDistributions()

  • Method Details

    • initialize

      public static void initialize()
      Run all methods needed to interact with the methods to select shot time or shot chance.

    • loadRawDistribution

      public static void loadRawDistribution()
      Reads in the CSV file. Creating a List for each AgeRange, where the items are Pairs of the String representation of the date and an Integer counting the number of doses administered.

    • populateDistributions

      public static void populateDistributions()
      Processes the raw distribution information into the EnumeratedDistributions that will be used to select the date of vaccination administration. Must be called after loadRawDistribution().

    • loadShotProbabilitiesByAge

      public static void loadShotProbabilitiesByAge()
      Load the JSON file that has a map of age ranges to percentage of that age range that has been vaccinated.

    • selectShotTime

      public static long selectShotTime(Person person, long time)
      Selects a time for an individual to get the COVID-19 vaccine based on their age and historical distributions of vaccine administration based on age.
      Parameters:
      person - The person to use
      time - Time in the simulation used for age calculation
      Returns:
      A time in the simulation when the person should get their first (only?) shot

    • chanceOfGettingShot

      public static double chanceOfGettingShot(Person person, long time)
      Determines the likelihood that an individual will get a COVID-19 vaccine based on their age.
      Parameters:
      person - The person to use
      time - Time in the simulation used for age calculation
      Returns:
      a value between 0 - 1 representing the chance the person will get vaccinated
